0.text: 2 mm diameter nodule in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

1.text: Linear areas of atelectasis in the upper lobe of both lungs

2.text: Linear areas of atelectasis in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe

3.text: Linear areas of atelectasis in the lingular segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Linear areas of atelectasis in the medial segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Subcentimeter parenchymal air cyst in the superior segment of the right lower lobe
